title: Executive Order 7773—Modification of Executive Order No. 6957 of February 4, 1935, Withdrawing Certain Public Lands

flags.justification: A narrow, technical modification authorizing one specific coal-prospecting permit for one named individual under an existing statutory leasing framework.
This authorizes permit issuance under an existing, established statutory leasing framework rather than creating new standards.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, one-time modification enabling a specific permit issuance, not a grant of new ongoing authority.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
About as narrow and individual-specific an action as exists: a coal-prospecting permit authorization for one named individual.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
A single, narrow, individual-specific carve-out, not a broad undermining exemption.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. An individual-specific permit authorization for one named person, Frank Colobuffalo.
